title: All Tropical Fish Collection
description: This resource pack works with the All TropicalFish Datapack, which allows you to collect all tropical fish species.
body:
This Resource Pack works with the [All TropicalFish Datapack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/all-tropical-fish-datapack) which allows you to collect all tropical fish variations.
It can help you to visualise more precisely each tropical fish variant via custom models and retexturing for all colours in the advancement menu.
With this resource pack, collecting them all is easy!
